features.evidence: dell s newest business laptop is straight out of the future it has no visible trackpad this row of touch keys and is powered by a processor you ve probably never used before but for every next gen feature in here you also have a hefty price tag so is this laptop worth your money here s our full review of the dell xps 13 perhaps the most noticeable aspect of the dell xps 13 is its design dell s new futuristic look from 2023 carries over and we still have super sleek edges all around things are also significantly different on the inside there s this new borderless trackpad that might trick you into thinking the entire bottom portion is the track pad it looks really cool but the borders are still there you just have to get used to where they are above that you see these squared off keys that look very retro and premium at the same time the keys have low travel and are great to type on even if you type a lot this row of capacitive keys was a mixed bag for me though unlike the macbook touch bar from a few years ago these cannot adapt to the app you re using this means that they look cooler than regular keys and offer no additional functionality but you do lose out on the clicky feedback you d expect from keys escape and delete the mixed feelings also extend to the ports here of which you get only two these are usb type c thunderbolt 4 ports and there isn t even a single usb a port so you ll still be needing a hub for basic accessories or for plugging in an hdmi cable while the laptop looks stunning from any angle whether on a desk or in your hands the lack of the notch between the keyboard and lid makes it a little hard to open that s said the laptop is really easy to carry around and is comfortable even in longer use making it great for frequent travelers i also really enjoyed the screen of the d xps3 it s a cris oled display with great colors and the 2800 by 1800 variant we have comes with a really high pixel density so from spreadsheets with a lot of text to watching movies this laptop is very enjoyable the screen on this variant also comes with touch capabilities making navigation and multitasking of breeze something to note here is that the laptop also comes in a 1080p display variant but that one doesn t have a touchcreen i use the dell xps 13 almost exclusively as my primary office laptop over the past few days and i am glad i did the snapdragon x elite power laptop is snappy in day to day use while i did notice a handful of stuttering instances at my time with it there were no major performance concerns applications i use daily included 10 to 20 tabs split across two browsers along with multiple word and excel windows the laptop handled all of these with these that said something to note here is that not all applications and programs natively support the new arm architecture of the snapdragon x elite chip if you re planning to get any snapdragon based system it s a good idea to use free resources windows on arm to check if your apps are supported being an ai pc the d xps 13 also comes with many new windows studio effects which are powered straight from the npu the the effects are much more polished and your cpu and gpu remain unaffected making them available for other workloads ai powered chat bots co pilot which you now have a dedicated key for still primarily use the cpu and gpu though other features the speakers on the new xps work great the fingerprint scanner is well hidden in this layout and is quick and accurate as is the facial recognition program for windows hello the dell xps 13 offers phenomenal battery life and although it doesn t last the claim 27 hours this is easily one of the best laptops to carry for a business trip a full charge should offer enough power for most long flights out there something that also makes this a great laptop for entertainment the bundled adapter also charges up the laptop quickly and since it s type c charging the laptop can be charged equally from any side a very underrated feature the new d xps 13 is a a powerful laptop with some interesting design choices while it is the ultimate showof worthy office laptop for some the capacitive keys in this lid can be a slight nuisance for others so we recommend you try one of these in person before you make the call if the design choices are not an issue the dell xps 13 is one of the best premium thin and light laptops you can buy right now and it doesn t really compromise on any of the areas a business laptop should take seriously for these reasons we rate the dell xps 13 4 on five subscribe to unbox by for more reviews and all things tech
value: average battery life in hours: 18 Hours

features.evidence: can the x elite chip finally save the dell xps and make it worth buying again or should you just buy the m3 air instead well we re going to compare everything in this video to find out so here are all of the specs for each machine and let s jump right into the design differences now some people really don t the function keys being touch instead of actual buttons but honestly i don t mind it that much and i have to say i really the super clean look of the dell xps this looks way more futuristic than the macbook i that the keyboard goes all the way to the edge and it also feels really good with a good amount of key travel of course the macbook also feels really nice and the macbooks have the best trackpads but now the dell has this hidden trackpad that s also magnetically haptic so it feels really nice it s very responsive i definitely dig it and this thing also has windows hello built in whereas the macbook even with that notch it doesn t have face id but the mac has touch id which the dell has a fingerprint scanner built in as well and with the xps being so tiny how are the speakers let s test them i m singing take me to a world of silver pill somewhere unar bring me back to where we started out now the dell does get loud but it almost feels they re pushing the speakers too much because the sound quality on the mac is a lot better but you let us know below now it s crazy how small the xps is and it also weighs only 2

dell s newest business laptop is straight out of the future it has no visible trackpad this row of touch keys and is powered by a processor you ve probably never used before but for every next gen feature in here you also have a hefty price tag so is this laptop worth your money here s our full review of the dell xps 13 perhaps the most noticeable aspect of the dell xps 13 is its design dell s new futuristic look from 2023 carries over and we still have super sleek edges all around things are also significantly different on the inside there s this new borderless trackpad that might trick you into thinking the entire bottom portion is the track pad it looks really cool but the borders are still there you just have to get used to where they are above that you see these squared off keys that look very retro and premium at the same time the keys have low travel and are great to type on even if you type a lot this row of capacitive keys was a mixed bag for me though unlike the macbook touch bar from a few years ago these cannot adapt to the app you re using this means that they look cooler than regular keys and offer no additional functionality but you do lose out on the clicky feedback you d expect from keys escape and delete the mixed feelings also extend to the ports here of which you get only two these are usb type c thunderbolt 4 ports and there isn t even a single usb a port so you ll still be needing a hub for basic accessories or for plugging in an hdmi cable while the laptop looks stunning from any angle whether on a desk or in your hands the lack of the notch between the keyboard and lid makes it a little hard to open that s said the laptop is really easy to carry around and is comfortable even in longer use making it great for frequent travelers i also really enjoyed the screen of the d xps3 it s a cris oled display with great colors and the 2800 by 1800 variant we have comes with a really high pixel density so from spreadsheets with a lot of text to watching movies this laptop is very enjoyable the screen on this variant also comes with touch capabilities making navigation and multitasking of breeze something to note here is that the laptop also comes in a 1080p display variant but that one doesn t have a touchcreen i use the dell xps 13 almost exclusively as my primary office laptop over the past few days and i am glad i did the snapdragon x elite power laptop is snappy in day to day use while i did notice a handful of stuttering instances at my time with it there were no major performance concerns applications i use daily included 10 to 20 tabs split across two browsers along with multiple word and excel windows the laptop handled all of these with these that said something to note here is that not all applications and programs natively support the new arm architecture of the snapdragon x elite chip if you re planning to get any snapdragon based system it s a good idea to use free resources windows on arm to check if your apps are supported being an ai pc the d xps 13 also comes with many new windows studio effects which are powered straight from the npu the the effects are much more polished and your cpu and gpu remain unaffected making them available for other workloads ai powered chat bots co pilot which you now have a dedicated key for still primarily use the cpu and gpu though other features the speakers on the new xps work great the fingerprint scanner is well hidden in this layout and is quick and accurate as is the facial recognition program for windows hello the dell xps 13 offers phenomenal battery life and although it doesn t last the claim 27 hours this is easily one of the best laptops to carry for a business trip a full charge should offer enough power for most long flights out there something that also makes this a great laptop for entertainment the bundled adapter also charges up the laptop quickly and since it s type c charging the laptop can be charged equally from any side a very underrated feature the new d xps 13 is a a powerful laptop with some interesting design choices while it is the ultimate showof worthy office laptop for some the capacitive keys in this lid can be a slight nuisance for others so we recommend you try one of these in person before you make the call if the design choices are not an issue the dell xps 13 is one of the best premium thin and light laptops you can buy right now and it doesn t really compromise on any of the areas a business laptop should take seriously for these reasons we rate the dell xps 13 4 on five subscribe to unbox by for more reviews and all things tech

dell s newest business laptop is straight out of the future it has no visible trackpad this row of touch keys and is powered by a processor you ve probably never used before but for every next gen feature in here you also have a hefty price tag so is this laptop worth your money here s our full review of the dell xps 13 perhaps the most noticeable aspect of the dell xps 13 is its design dell s new futuristic look from 2023 carries over and we still have super sleek edges all around things are also significantly different on the inside there s this new borderless trackpad that might trick you into thinking the entire bottom portion is the track pad it looks really cool but the borders are still there you just have to get used to where they are above that you see these squared off keys that look very retro and premium at the same time the keys have low travel and are great to type on even if you type a lot this row of capacitive keys was a mixed bag for me though unlike the macbook touch bar from a few years ago these cannot adapt to the app you re using this means that they look cooler than regular keys and offer no additional functionality but you do lose out on the clicky feedback you d expect from keys escape and delete the mixed feelings also extend to the ports here of which you get only two these are usb type c thunderbolt 4 ports and there isn t even a single usb a port so you ll still be needing a hub for basic accessories or for plugging in an hdmi cable while the laptop looks stunning from any angle whether on a desk or in your hands the lack of the notch between the keyboard and lid makes it a little hard to open that s said the laptop is really easy to carry around and is comfortable even in longer use making it great for frequent travelers i also really enjoyed the screen of the d xps3 it s a cris oled display with great colors and the 2800 by 1800 variant we have comes with a really high pixel density so from spreadsheets with a lot of text to watching movies this laptop is very enjoyable the screen on this variant also comes with touch capabilities making navigation and multitasking of breeze something to note here is that the laptop also comes in a 1080p display variant but that one doesn t have a touchcreen i use the dell xps 13 almost exclusively as my primary office laptop over the past few days and i am glad i did the snapdragon x elite power laptop is snappy in day to day use while i did notice a handful of stuttering instances at my time with it there were no major performance concerns applications i use daily included 10 to 20 tabs split across two browsers along with multiple word and excel windows the laptop handled all of these with these that said something to note here is that not all applications and programs natively support the new arm architecture of the snapdragon x elite chip if you re planning to get any snapdragon based system it s a good idea to use free resources windows on arm to check if your apps are supported being an ai pc the d xps 13 also comes with many new windows studio effects which are powered straight from the npu the the effects are much more polished and your cpu and gpu remain unaffected making them available for other workloads ai powered chat bots co pilot which you now have a dedicated key for still primarily use the cpu and gpu though other features the speakers on the new xps work great the fingerprint scanner is well hidden in this layout and is quick and accurate as is the facial recognition program for windows hello the dell xps 13 offers phenomenal battery life and although it doesn t last the claim 27 hours this is easily one of the best laptops to carry for a business trip a full charge should offer enough power for most long flights out there something that also makes this a great laptop for entertainment the bundled adapter also charges up the laptop quickly and since it s type c charging the laptop can be charged equally from any side a very underrated feature the new d xps 13 is a a powerful laptop with some interesting design choices while it is the ultimate showof worthy office laptop for some the capacitive keys in this lid can be a slight nuisance for others so we recommend you try one of these in person before you make the call if the design choices are not an issue the dell xps 13 is one of the best premium thin and light laptops you can buy right now and it doesn t really compromise on any of the areas a business laptop should take seriously for these reasons we rate the dell xps 13 4 on five subscribe to unbox by for more reviews and all things tech

the best premium thin and light laptops you can buy right now and it doesn t really compromise on any of the areas a business laptop should take seriously for these reasons we rate the dell xps 13 4 on five subscribe to unbox by for more reviews and all things tech

review_summary: dell s newest business laptop is straight out of the future it has no visible trackpad this row of touch keys and is powered by a processor you ve probably never used before but for every next gen feature in here you also have a hefty price tag so is this laptop worth your money here s our full review of the dell xps 13 perhaps the most noticeable aspect of the dell xps 13 is its design dell s new futuristic look from 2023 carries over and we still have super sleek edges all around things are also significantly different on the inside there s this new borderless trackpad that might trick you into thinking the entire bottom portion is the track pad it looks really cool but the borders are still there you just have to get used to where they are above that you see these squared off keys that look very retro and premium at the same time the keys have low travel and are great to type on even if you type a lot this row of capacitive keys was a mixed bag for me though unlike the macbook touch bar from a few years ago these cannot adapt to the app you re using this means that they look cooler than regular keys and offer no additional functionality but you do lose out on the clicky feedback you d expect from keys escape and delete the mixed feelings also extend to the ports here of which you get only two these are usb type c thunderbolt 4 ports and there isn t even a single usb a port so you ll still be needing a hub for basic accessories or for plugging in an hdmi cable while the laptop looks stunning from any angle whether on a desk or in your hands the lack of the notch between the keyboard and lid makes it a little hard to open that s said the laptop is really easy to carry around and is comfortable even in longer use making it great for frequent travelers i also really enjoyed the screen of the d xps3 it s a cris oled display with great colors and the 2800 by 1800 variant we have comes with a really high pixel density so from spreadsheets with a lot of text to watching movies this laptop is very enjoyable the screen on this variant also comes with touch capabilities making navigation and multitasking of breeze something to note here is that the laptop also comes in a 1080p display variant but that one doesn t have a touchcreen i use the dell xps 13 almost exclusively as my primary office laptop over the past few days and i am glad i did the snapdragon x elite power laptop is snappy in day to day use while i did notice a handful of stuttering instances at my time with it there were no major performance concerns applications i use daily included 10 to 20 tabs split across two browsers along with multiple word and excel windows the laptop handled all of these with these that said something to note here is that not all applications and programs natively support the new arm architecture of the snapdragon x elite chip if you re planning to get any snapdragon based system it s a good idea to use free resources windows on arm to check if your apps are supported being an ai pc the d xps 13 also comes with many new windows studio effects which are powered straight from the npu the the effects are much more polished and your cpu and gpu remain unaffected making them available for other workloads ai powered chat bots co pilot which you now have a dedicated key for still primarily use the cpu and gpu though other features the speakers on the new xps work great the fingerprint scanner is well hidden in this layout and is quick and accurate as is the facial recognition program for windows hello the dell xps 13 offers phenomenal battery life and although it doesn t last the claim 27 hours this is easily one of the best laptops to carry for a business trip a full charge should offer enough power for most long flights out there something that also makes this a great laptop for entertainment the bundled adapter also charges up the laptop quickly and since it s type c charging the laptop can be charged equally from any side a very underrated feature the new d xps 13 is a a powerful laptop with some interesting design choices while it is the ultimate showof worthy office laptop for some the capacitive keys in this lid can be a slight nuisance for others so we recommend you try one of these in person before you make the call if the design choices are not an issue the dell xps 13 is one of the best premium thin and light laptops you can buy right now and it doesn t really compromise on any of the areas a business laptop should take seriously for these reasons we rate the dell xps 13 4 on five subscribe to unbox by for more reviews and all things tech can the x elite chip finally save the dell xps and make it worth buying again or should you just buy the m3 air instead well we re
